data.value: '{0}' cannot be reached.

data.value: Quorum settings have successfully been changed.

data.value: Resource '{0}' is not a storage class resources.

data.value: Failed to query the event log publisher.

data.value: Failed to save client access point changes.

data.value: Failed to get all available drive letters because some of the nodes of the cluster are down.

data.value: An error was encountered while attempting to ping '{0}'.

data.value: Could not move the resource to available storage.

data.value: An error occurred while retrieving the registry key for the network '{0}'.

data.value: Critical

data.value: The resource '{0}' did not come online.

data.value: An error occurred while determining if the resource '{0}' is in maintenance.

data.value: The cluster service on node '{0}' is not configured correctly to be started.

data.name: RenameResourceFail_Text
data.value: An error occurred renaming resource '{0}' to '{1}'.

data.value: The resource '{0}' did go offline.

data.value: An error occurred copying a string.

data.value: The registry value was not the correct type. For more information about this failure see the FailoverClustering-Manager Admin channel in Event Viewer.

data.value: The service failed to stop.

data.name: Exception_UnsupportedNoCno_Text
data.value:
You cannot use Failover Cluster Manager to manage a cluster that was created without an administrative access point.
You must use Windows PowerShell to manage the cluster.

data.value: The cluster service is not running. Make sure that the service is running on all nodes in the cluster.

data.value: QueryServiceConfig2 failed.

data.value: Failed to format an error message.

data.value: IP Address

data.name: Exception_Generic_Text
data.value: This is a sample content text.

data.name: FileShareWitnessSettingAsQuorum_Text
data.value: Attempting to set the quorum mode to Node and File Share Majority.

data.name: TaskDialog_WindowTitle_SystemDriveValidation_Text
data.value: System drive mismatch

data.name: Exception_ValidationInProgress_Text
data.value: A validation test was unable to get needed access to cluster or system resources, probably because another instance of the Validate a Configuration Wizard was already running on the cluster. If that is the cause, after the other instance completes, the report it generates will be in the %systemroot%\Cluster\Reports folder on each cluster node.

data.name: StoragePoolInvalidValidationStateException_Caption_Text
data.value: Error validating the storage pool resource

data.name: Exception_GenericScriptCreation_Header_Text
data.value: Could not create generic script resource.

data.value: Only a physical disk can be set as a pass through disk.

data.value: An error was finding the function ClNetCfgGetNodesClusterSetupTopology.

data.value: This instance has already been disposed.

data.name: FileShareWitnessVerifyingSettingsFailed_Text
data.value: The file share path does not contain a value.

data.name: Exception_StorageTest_Text
data.value: Node '{0}' could not be initialized for validation testing. Possible causes for this are that another validation test is being run from another management client, or a previous validation test was unexpectedly terminated. If a previous validation test was unexpectedly terminated, the best corrective action is to restart the node and try again.

data.value: '{0}' is not a valid file share path.

data.name: ClientAccessPoint_MissingMatchingNonTunneledAddress_Text
data.value: A tunneled address is present in the Address collection, but no matching non-tunneled address is present.

data.name: Resource_TakeOffline_Fail_Text
data.value: An error occurred while attempting to take the resource '{0}' offline.

data.name: Migration_ErrorReadingSourceClusterData_Text
data.value: An error occurred reading source cluster registry data.

data.name: Exception_UnsupportedVersion_Text
data.value: The cluster to which you are attempting to connect is not a version of the cluster supported by this version of Failover Cluster Manager.

data.name: NativeMessage_EntryPointNotFound
data.value: While the cluster was being opened, an error occurred because of mismatched libraries. Check the event log for more information.

data.value: Unable to retrieve the preferred owners for the group '{0}'.

data.value: Failed to resolve computer name '{0}' with the domain name service.

data.value: A common cause for this is dependency expression which is too complex.

data.value: Check the spelling of the cluster name. Otherwise, there might be a problem with your network. Make sure the cluster nodes are turned on and connected to the network or contact your network administrator.

data.name: EventPublisherOpenFailed_Text

data.name: AddNodeFail_S2DNotSupported_Text
data.value:
recommends deploying SDDC on WSSD [https://www.com/en-us/cloud-platform/software-defined-datacenter] certified hardware offerings for production environments. The WSSD offerings will be pre-validated on Windows Server 2019 in the coming months. In the meantime, we are making the SDDC bits available early to Windows Server 2019 Insiders to allow for testing and evaluation in preparation for WSSD certified hardware becoming available.
Customers interested in upgrading existing WSSD environments to Windows Server 2019 should contact for recommendations on how to proceed. Please call support [https://support.com/en-us/help/4051701/global-customer-service-phone-numbers].

data.value: (Resource Type Unavailable)

data.name: StorageResourceIsNotStorageResource
data.value: {0} is not a storage resource and only storage resources can be added.

data.name: ClusterGroup_BringOnline_Fail_Text
data.value: An error occurred while attempting to start the clustered role '{0}'.

data.name: InvalidFileShareAccess_Text
data.value: Access was denied to share path'{0}'.

data.name: OpenResourceFail_Text
data.value: An error occurred opening resource '{0}'.

data.name: Cluster_GetAvailableStorageGroup_Failed_Text
data.value: Could not retrieve the available storage group for the cluster '{0}'.

data.name: EventOpenSessionFailed_Text
data.value: Failed to open the event session.

data.name: FileShareWitnessSettingPermissionsFailed_Text
data.value: There was an error granting the cluster access to the selected file share '{0}'.

data.name: CreateClusterNameAccountFail_Text
data.value: Creating cluster name account {0} failed.

data.name: ClientAccessPoint_GroupRequired_Text
data.value: A valid group is required.

data.name: NetShareInfo_GrantClusterPermission_Fail_Text
data.value: Failed to grant permissions for the cluster '{1}' to access the share '{0}'.

data.name: Exception_AccessDenied_Header_Text
data.value: Cannot connect to {0}

data.name: ClusterGroup_GetRegistryKeyFailed_Text
data.value: An error occurred while retrieving the registry key for the clustered role '{0}'.

data.name: Cluster_GetNetworkClassResources_Failed_Text
data.value: Could not retrieve all of the network class (IP address) resources for the cluster '{0}'.

data.name: Network_Refresh_Fail_Text
data.value: Unable to refresh the information for the network '{0}'.

data.name: PropertyValue_IncorrectType_Text
data.value: The value provided is a different type that what the property '{0}' expects.

data.name: TaskDialog_WindowTitle_GenericScriptCreation_Text
data.value: Generic Script Error

data.name: EventOpenChannelEnumFailed_Text
data.value: Failed to enumerate the event logs.

data.name: ClientAccessPoint_IPAddressDependencies_Text
data.value: Configuring the dependencies for the IP address resources.

data.name: SetPreferredOwnerNodesFail_Text
data.value: An error occurred while setting the preferred owner node list for the clustered role '{0}'.

data.name: Exception_HyperVNotFound_Text
data.value: The required assemblies to run the virtual machine management tools were not found on the system. You can install these tools in Server Manager by installing either the Hyper-V role or the feature called "Remote Server Administration Tools."

data.name: NetServerEnum_Failed_Text
data.value: Could not retrieve the list of clusters on the network.

data.name: Exception_NodeNotReachable_Text
data.value: The node cannot be contacted. Ensure that the node is powered on and is connected to the network.

data.name: GetClusterableDisksFail_Text
data.value: An error occurred retrieving the disks available for clustering on node '{0}'.

data.name: TaskDialog_WindowTitle_Text
data.value: Please confirm action

data.name: MSDTCBaseResourceName_Text
data.value: MSDTC

data.name: MSMQBaseResourceName_Text
data.value: MSMQ

data.name: Node_GetCommonProperties_Fail_Text
data.value: An error occurred while retrieving common properties for node '{0}'.

data.name: VM_CancelMigration_Fail_Text
data.value: An error occurred while canceling the migration of resource '{0}'.

data.name: Exception_ReadOnlyAccess_Header_Text
data.value: Access to the cluster is read-only

data.name: NetShareLookupCNOFailed_Text
data.value: An error occurred looking up the security ID of the cluster name object for '{0}'.

data.name: Resource_LoadState_Fail_Text
data.value: An error occurred while retrieving state information for the resource '{0}'.

data.name: Resource_RemoveRegistryCheckpoint_Fail_Text
data.value: An error occurred while removing a registry checkpoint for the resource '{0}'.

data.name: Resource_SharedVolumeSetRedirectedIOMode_Fail_Text
data.value: An error occurred while enabling redirected access for Cluster Shared Volume '{0}'.

data.name: FileShareWitnessRevokingPermissionsFormat_Text
data.value: Attempting to revoke the cluster's permissions for file share '{0}'.

data.name: Resource_LoadResourceType_Fail_Text
data.value: An error occurred while retrieving the resource type for the resource '{0}'.

data.name: TaskDialog_WindowTitle_InputValidation_Text
data.value: Validation Failed

data.name: Exception_StorageTest_Header_Text
data.value: Storage cannot be validated at this time.

data.name: SystemTimeToFileTimeFailed_Text
data.value: Unable to convert time

data.name: ClientAccessPoint_ExistingIPAddresses_Text
data.value: Configuring existing IP address resources.

data.name: TaskDialog_WindowTitle_ResourceNotOnline_Text
data.value: Resouce Failed to Go Online

data.name: StateChange_Timeout_Text
data.value: The desired state change for '{0}' did not occur before the timeout expired.

data.name: Exception_SharedVolumeNotOnline_Text
data.value: An error is preventing Cluster Shared Volume '{0}' from coming online. To successfully resume, the volume must be brought online.

data.name: NetShareCopySDFailed_Text
data.value: An error occurred copying file share permissions for share '{0}'.

data.name: TaskDialog_WindowTitle_ResourceLocked_Text
data.value: Resource Status

data.name: Exception_ResourceNotOnline_Text
data.value: The resource '{0}' did not successfully go online.

data.name: NodeEvictTimeout_Text
data.value: Evicting '{0}' took too long and was stopped. The node may require additional manual cleanup to remove its cluster related settings.

data.name: NetShareSetInfoFailed_Text
data.value: Unable the save the properties of share '{0}'.

data.name: Exception_Generic_Header_Text
data.value: The operation has failed.

data.name: Exception_MultipleCoreResourcesFound_Text
data.value: The clustered role is not configured correctly; it contains multiple resources of type '{0}'.

data.name: Exception_ParsingError_Text
data.value: Parsing error at position {0}.

data.name: StorageWitnessSettingAsQuorumFormat_Text
data.value: Attempting Node and Disk Majority quorum configuration with '{0}'.

data.name: RegistryFailure_Text
data.value: There was an error retrieving information from the registry. For more information about this failure see the FailoverClustering-Manager Admin channel in Event Viewer.

data.name: EnumServices_Fail_Text
data.value: Unable to retrieve the services from '{0}'.

data.name: AzureWitnessCreatingResource_Text
data.value: Creating cluster resource for cloud witness...

data.name: Cluster_GetNetworks_Failed_Text
data.value: Failed to retrieve the list of networks for '{0}'.

data.name: Resource_ReleaseLease_Fail_Text
data.value: An error occurred while releasing the DHCP lease for the resource '{0}'.
